case_title: JAMAL ABOUDAMOUS VS. WING NIN CHENG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JAMAL ABOUDAMOUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WING NIN CHENG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE ON DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JAMAL ABOUDAMOUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WING NIN CHENG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE ON DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,941.55 FILED BY ABOUDAMOUS, JAMAL AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, WING NIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,383.00 FILED BY CHENG, WING NIN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ABOUDAMOUS, JAMAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, WING NIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHENG, WING NIN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ABOUDAMOUS, JAMAL $276.60 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $306.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABOUDAMOUS, JAMAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, WING NIN $2,353.24 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,443.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ABOUDAMOUS, JAMAL CHENG, WING NIN
